## Meeting purpose

[Weekly check-in between GrowthXLabs and Litebox to discuss website design updates and brand direction.](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homepage design to focus on impactful hero section with animated video/graphics and clear messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Brand assets and style guide to be expanded after website completion, exploring edgier swag/collateral designs](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Target launch date of Sept 8-9 for homepage, ahead of potential conference speaking engagement on Sept 10](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
  - [Blog and documentation site structure to be further discussed and potentially integrated into main site](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)

## Topics

### Homepage Design Updates

  - [Hero section to incorporate animated graphics/video that expands on scroll](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Emphasis on showcasing human-AI collaboration in GrowthXLabs' process](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Straightforward, information-rich sections below the hero](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - ["Who we are for" section to link to a detailed qualification criteria page](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Brand Extension

  - [Explore more dynamic, artist-inspired designs for swag and collateral](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2391.0)
  - [Expand on black and white imagery, collage styles for unique tech company branding](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)
  - [Brand book to include guidelines on shapes, patterns, and compositions for various use cases](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

### Website Structure

  - [Consider integrating docs.growthxlabs.com content into main site to consolidate traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2579.0)
  - [Blog structure and references to be provided by Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)
  - [Strapi confirmed as CMS, aligning with new customer relationship](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2971.0)

### Timeline and Priorities

  - [Aim for homepage launch by Sept 8-9, ahead of potential Saster conference speaking engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
  - [Focus on completing homepage before expanding to additional page types](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2755.0)
  - [Marcel to provide blog inspiration and page type examples currently in docs](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2838.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send homepage content updates and blog design references](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2510.0)
  - [Litebox to analyze and propose integration of documentation into main site scope](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2555.0)
  - [Team to adjust roadmap considering potential Sept 8-9 soft launch date](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=2882.0)
  - [Litebox to share meeting summary and recording](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=3001.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more detailed explanations for "How it Works" section illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/Q-v185fRjRRZmg2qcTSiffd5hXvwVfh3?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
